pages.text: Forget everything you knew about vanilla fishing!$(br)$(br)Now, to cast your line, you need to hold the rod in your hand and press $(l)Shift + Right Click$(). This will open a special fishing menu.
Note: The basic fishing rod recipe has changed. Now it requires a bit of iron to craft.
In the opened menu, you $(l)must$() place a bait. Without bait, the fish simply won't pay attention to you.$(br)$(br)The basic fishing rod also requires bait and works through this menu.
